en: who also happens to be harassing the parents in his quest for visitation.
ko: 정자 기증자가 부모를 괴롭히고 있는 상황이군요.

en: Well, yeah, but, I mean, without this man's sperm,
ko: 맞아요, 하지만 이 남자의 정자가 없었다면 아이는 존재하지 않았을 겁니다.

en: the child in question wouldn't exist.
Now you're thinking like a lawyer.
Yes, Ms. Woods. Although Mr. Huntington makes an excellent point,
I have to wonder if the defendant kept a thorough record of every sperm emission made throughout his life.
ko: 피고가 평생 동안의 모든 정자 배출을 철저히 기록했는지 궁금합니다.

en: Well, unless the defendant attempted to contact every single one-night stand
to determine if a child resulted in those unions, he has no parental claim over this child whatsoever.
ko: 이 아이에 대한 부모의 권리는 전혀 없다는 겁니다.

en: Why now? Why this sperm? I see your point.
And for that matter, all masturbatory emissions where his sperm was clearly not seeking an egg
could be termed reckless abandonment. I believe you've just won your case.
